allow: PowerShell($line = \(Get-Content "e:\\vercel\\components\\scroll-hero.tsx" -Encoding utf8\)[31]; $line.ToCharArray\(\) | ForEach-Object { [int][char]$_ } | Where-Object { $_ -gt 127 -or $_ -eq 32 } | Group-Object | Select-Object Name, Count; $line)

PowerShell($line = \(Get-Content "e:\\vercel\\components\\scroll-hero.tsx" -Encoding utf8\)[31]; $idx = $line.IndexOf\([char]160\); "nbsp at index $idx"; "quote positions: " + \(\($line.ToCharArray\(\) | ForEach-Object -Begin {$i=0} -Process { if \($_ -eq "'"\) { $i }; $i++ }\) -join ', '\))

PowerShell($ok = $false; foreach \($i in 1..10\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $ok = $true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($ok\) { "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $html = $r.Content; foreach \($needle in @\('located in the heart of DENMARK', 'Creative design agency', 'js-heart-svg', 'js-microchar', 'New project?', 'Trustpilot'\)\) { if \($html.Contains\($needle\)\) { "FOUND: $needle" } else { "MISSING: $needle" } } } else { "server not reachable" })
